items.title: Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. will pick up his player option, as reported by @mikeascotto.bsky.social
items.author: Jim Owczarski
items.body_excerpt:
Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. will pick up his player option, as reported by @mikeascotto.bsky.social 

As these player options pile up, Jon Horst will need to get creative with cleaning up the roster…

www.jsonline.com/story/sports...

media.title: Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. will pick up his player option
media.description: Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. will pick up his player option for the 2026-27.

items.title: Sources: Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. is exercising his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season. The 25-year-old guard will remain a key piece for the Bucks in the post Giannis Antetokounmpo era.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: Sources: Milwaukee Bucks guard Kevin Porter Jr. is exercising his $5.39 million player option for the 2026-27 season. The 25-year-old guard will remain a key piece for the Bucks in the post Giannis Antetokounmpo era.
